stemHtml: What is the chart characteristic which achieves the ICAO requirement of a straight line on an en-route chart approximating to a great circle track on the Earth?

options.a: The scale must change at the same rate in all directions.
options.b: Chart convergence approximates to Earth convergence.
options.c: The chart conversion angle must be less than 30°.
options.d: Meridians and parallels of latitude intersect at 90°.
